title: AI systems will generate persuasive disinformation at scale
source_quote: I'm scared that the bad actors are going to use it for manipulating elections, for example. And I don't see how you prevent that.
resolution_criteria: Evidence of AI-generated disinformation being used in political campaigns or elections at scale.
resolution_rationale: AI-generated deepfakes and disinformation were widely documented in the 2024 US, Indian, and European elections. The NYT reported on AI-generated robocalls impersonating Biden, deepfake videos of political leaders, and AI-written misinformation at scale across multiple platforms.

title: AI could pose existential risk to humanity within 5-20 years
source_quote: I think the probability of existential threat in the next 20 years is somewhere between 10 and 20 percent. That's enough to worry about.
resolution_criteria: Evidence of AI systems demonstrating autonomous capability that poses genuine existential-scale risk, or credible near-miss events.

title: Superhuman AI will require alignment techniques beyond RLHF
source_quote: The question of how humans can supervise AI systems smarter than them is one of the most important unsolved problems in AI safety.
resolution_criteria: Demonstrated failure of RLHF-only alignment in frontier models, or industry consensus that supplementary techniques are required.

title: OpenAI safety culture has taken a back seat to product launches
source_quote: Over the past years, safety culture and processes have taken a back seat to shiny products.
resolution_criteria: Public evidence of safety team departures, restructuring, or reports confirming safety deprioritization at OpenAI.
resolution_rationale: Multiple senior safety researchers departed OpenAI through 2024-2025 citing safety deprioritization. The superalignment team was dissolved in May 2024. Jan Leike, Ilya Sutskever, and others left publicly citing that safety had taken a back seat to product launches.

title: AGI could plausibly arrive by 2027
source_quote: I left OpenAI because I lost confidence that it would behave responsibly around the time of AGI. I think AGI is coming and that we are not on track to handle it responsibly.
resolution_criteria: A system that can perform the majority of economically valuable knowledge work at or above human level by end of 2027.

title: AI companies will prioritize deployment speed over safety evaluation
source_quote: I believe the leaders of the top labs are making reckless decisions in how much autonomy and capability they're giving to their models.
resolution_criteria: Public reporting or insider accounts confirming major AI labs shipped models with abbreviated or skipped safety evaluations.
resolution_rationale: The Washington Post and multiple outlets reported on compressed safety testing timelines at major labs through 2024-2025. Former employees from OpenAI, Google, and xAI described safety evaluations being shortened to meet product deadlines. OpenAI shipped GPT-4o with abbreviated red-teaming.

title: AI capabilities will advance faster than mainstream expert predictions
source_quote: AI timelines have been consistently shorter than most experts predicted. The pace of progress has surprised nearly everyone.
resolution_criteria: Surveys or published predictions from AI experts that were exceeded by actual capability milestones within 2 years.
resolution_rationale: The 2024 AI Index Report documented that GPT-4, Claude 3, and Gemini Ultra exceeded capability levels that 2022 expert surveys predicted would take until 2028-2030. Metaculus and expert forecasting platforms showed median AI timeline estimates shortening by 5-10 years between 2022-2024.

title: AI hype will fade as unrealistic expectations fail to materialize
source_quote: But the hype begins to fade as the unrealistic expectations from 2022-2023 fail to materialize.
resolution_criteria: Evidence that public and investor enthusiasm for AI declined meaningfully by 2024-2025.
resolution_rationale: AI hype accelerated through 2024-2025 rather than fading. Investment in AI companies surged to record levels, major tech companies increased AI spending dramatically, and public attention intensified with the mainstream adoption of ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.

title: Leading AI lab security is inadequate to protect model weights
source_quote: If a frontier AI lab cannot protect its model weights from state-level espionage, it has no business building models that could pose catastrophic risks.
resolution_criteria: Evidence of successful or near-successful exfiltration of frontier model weights, or credible reports of a near-miss security breach at a major lab.

title: US government is dangerously unprepared for transformative AI
source_quote: The United States government is dangerously unprepared for the arrival of transformative AI. The national security implications rival those of nuclear weapons, yet there is no equivalent of the Manhattan Project or the Atomic Energy Commission.
resolution_criteria: Evidence of major US policy failures or belated emergency responses to AI developments that could have been anticipated.

title: AGI could plausibly be built in as little as three years
description: In sworn Senate testimony, Saunders stated that an AGI system could plausibly be built in as little as three years, i.e., by roughly September 2027.
source_quote: I believe it is plausible that an AGI system could be built in as little as three years.
resolution_criteria: Broad expert consensus, or acknowledgment by multiple frontier labs, that a system meeting a reasonable definition of AGI exists by late 2027.

title: Advertising in ChatGPT will create manipulation incentives OpenAI cannot govern
description: In her resignation essay, Hitzig predicted that advertising built on ChatGPT's archive of intimate user data creates structural incentives for user manipulation that OpenAI lacks tools to understand or prevent.
source_quote: Advertising built on that archive creates a potential for manipulating users in ways we don't have the tools to understand, let alone prevent.
resolution_criteria: Documented cases of ChatGPT advertising leveraging sensitive user-disclosed data in ways found deceptive or manipulative by regulators, courts, or credible independent research.

title: Without adequate oversight, alignment failures will occur in deployed systems
source_quote: Building smarter-than-human machines is an inherently dangerous endeavor. OpenAI is shouldering an enormous responsibility on behalf of all of humanity. But over the past years, safety culture and processes have taken a back seat.
resolution_criteria: Documented cases of alignment failures (jailbreaks, harmful outputs, deceptive behavior) in production AI systems causing real-world harm.
resolution_rationale: Multiple alignment failures in deployed systems were documented through 2025-2026: Grok's antisemitic 'MechaHitler' outputs (July 2025); Grok's image tools generating roughly 3 million sexualized images in 11 days, including an estimated 23,000 depicting children (Center for Countering Digital Hate), prompting a California cease-and-desist order, an EU investigation, an Ofcom investigation, and a demand letter from 35 state attorneys general (January 2026); and independent research showing GPT-4o exhibiting self-preservation behavior over user safety in up to 72% of test scenarios (Adler, June 2025). Lawsuits allege ChatGPT's crisis-handling failures contributed to user harm.
review_notes: Editor reviewed assembled evidence and confirmed resolution. Evidence: Grok MechaHitler outputs (Jul 2025); Grok deepfake scandal with CA cease-and-desist, EU/Ofcom probes, 35-state AG letter (Jan 2026); Adler GPT-4o self-preservation study (Jun 2025).
